description:
Create a market research survey in LimeSurvey titled 'Smart Home Hub Feature Prioritization Study' using the credentials admin / Admin123!. Configure the survey with a 'Group by group' format and include three question groups: 'Product Concept Overview', 'Feature Prioritization', and 'Price Sensitivity'. 

The 'Product Concept Overview' group must contain a Text Display question (Code: 'concept') with the text: 'Please review the following product concept: The SmartHome Hub Pro is a next-generation smart home controller that integrates with all major smart home ecosystems.' 

The 'Feature Prioritization' group must contain a mandatory Ranking question (Code: 'featurerank') with the text: 'Please rank the following smart home hub features from most important (1) to least important (8):'. The question must include exactly 8 items: 'Voice control', 'Energy monitoring', 'Security integration', 'Lighting control', 'Climate scheduling', 'Remote access', 'Ecosystem compatibility', and 'Privacy controls'. 

The 'Price Sensitivity' group must contain a mandatory Numerical Input question (Code: 'maxprice') with the text: 'What is the maximum price you would be willing to pay?'. 

Activate the survey upon completion.

metadata.real_world_goal: Product concept testing and feature prioritization
